title: Twerby's Hot Chocolate Totem
description: Changes the design of the Totem of Undying to resemble that of Hot Chocolate with a straw and a marshmallow. The cup has a blushing face with dripping chocolate.
body: Changes the design of the **Totem of Undying** to resemble that of **_Hot Chocolate_** with a **_straw_** and a **_marshmallow_**. The cup has a **_blushing face_** with **_dripping chocolate_**.
